name: Technōs Japan
description: Defunct Japanese developer known for Kunio-kun, Renegade, Double Dragon, and influential beat 'em ups.

eras.title: Kunio and Double Dragon Era
eras.description: Creation of Kunio-kun, Renegade, Double Dragon, and Technōs' defining brawler identity.

eras.title: Late Technōs Era
eras.description: Later sequels and decline before bankruptcy.

eras.title: Arc System Works Legacy Era
eras.description: Kunio-kun and Double Dragon legacy under Arc System Works ownership.

notes: Arc System Works later acquired the Technōs intellectual properties; the original company itself was dissolved.
